question: What is the main theme of the image? Select from the following options: (A) The harbor filled with water vessels and a beach in the background.. (B) A group of fishermen working on a wooden boat in the sea.. (C) A man navigating a ship across the sea with several crew members.. gold_answer: The harbor filled with water vessels and a beach in the background
answer_choices: The harbor filled with water vessels and a beach in the background
